ability.name: Lend Me a Hand, Shadow!
ability.desc:
Passive: Every time Vex attacks, Shadow strikes a nearby enemy, dealing 30/45/250 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Whenever an enemy is struck 5 times by Shadow, Shadow strikes them again.

Active: Shadow launches 3 empowered strikes, dealing 130/195/1000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.

ability.name: Tidal Slashes
ability.desc: Unleash a flurry of 12 (%i:scaleAS%) slashes at the current target over 2 seconds, dealing 21/32/48 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Accretion
ability.desc: Deal 266/391/601 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the lowest Health enemy in range and permanently gain 12/18/33 maximum Health. If this kills them, permanently gain 30/40/70 maximum Health instead.

ability.name: Psi Strikes
ability.desc:
Passive: Every third attack is a double slash that deals 70/105/550 (%i:scaleAD%) bonus physical damage.

Active: After brief meditation, enter a Psi-State for 5 seconds, gaining 10% Omnivamp, 70% Attack Speed, and increased movement speed. Twice a second, fire a psychic projection at a random nearby enemy that deals 70/105/800 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage

ability.name: Meepteor Shower
ability.desc:
Call down a Meepteor on the target that deals 310/465/700 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

Meep Bonus: An additional 2 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) mini Meepteor are called down on nearby targets dealing 31/47/70 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage each.

ability.name: Temporal Shot
ability.desc: Active: Fire a blast at the current target that deals 174/261/397 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Every 8 takedowns, gain a drone that deals 8/12/18 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the current target on cast.

ability.name: Screech
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal 50/80/140 (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain 125/300/300 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 4 seconds and grant allies 20% Ability Power for the rest of combat.

ability.name: Marked for Death
ability.desc: Reposition up to one hex to throw a harpoon at the furthest enemy. The harpoon pulls the first enemy hit one hex forward and deals 60/90/135 (%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. Then, teleport behind them and cleave, dealing 210/315/720 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to them and 120/180/360 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to nearby enemies.

ability.name: Huddle Up!
ability.desc:
Gain 400/475/575 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 4 seconds. For the duration, allies within two hexes gain 15/25/60 (%i:scaleAP%) Armor and Magic Resistance.

Meep Bonus: Meeps grant 125/160/210 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield to the nearest 1 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) allies for 4 seconds.

ability.name: Disco Inferno
ability.desc:
Passive: On combat start, forge a temporary completed item. If 3 items are already equipped, a random completed item becomes Radiant this combat instead.

Active: Gain 125/200/500 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 3 seconds, then breath fire in a cone dealing 180/270/430 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. After any Shield on Ornn expires, Ornn enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for 3 seconds.

ability.name: Counter Star-ike
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for 3 seconds, reducing incoming damage by 15/20/25 (%i:scaleAP%) and gaining 400/450/500 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield. When the stance ends, strike all nearby enemies, dealing 68/104/153 (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) magic damage and Stunning them for second(s).

ability.name: Deathbeam
ability.desc: Channel a deathbeam in a line towards the current target for 43 seconds. It deals 320/480/2000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage per second, reduced by 80% per enemy it passes through. Deathbeam ignores 30% of the enemy's Magic Resist.

ability.name: Mega Time Kick
ability.desc:
Kick a ball at the current target that deals 255/380/575 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. On impact, the ball has a 100% Lucky chance to bounce to a new target dealing 85/130/190 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. These bounces can trigger additional bounces, but the odds halve with each bounce.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Asteroid Blaster
ability.desc:
Strafe to a nearby position, unleashing 21 missiles split between the target and all enemies within two hexes. Missiles deal 35/51/304 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage with a 20% Lucky chance of firing a mega missile that deals 123/179/1064 (%i:scaleAD%) instead.

Meep Bonus: Every 64 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) seconds, launch an Explosive Meep at the target, dealing 120/180/900 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage in a one hex radius on impact.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Meep Bait
ability.desc:
Dash through the current target, dealing 120/180/290 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Every third cast also summons a Mega Meep after a delay, briefly knocking the target up and dealing 260/395/625 (%i:scaleAP%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage. Adjacent enemies take 50% damage.

Meep Bonus: Add 1 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meep to the bait, increasing Mega Meep damage by 75/115/180 (%i:scaleAP%).

ability.name: Meep Impact
ability.desc:
Heal 456/567/846 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Health over 3 seconds. Slam the target, dealing 160/240/360 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and knocking up for 1.5/1.75/2 seconds. The impact creates meep waves that deal 50% of these effects in the target's row.

Meep Bonus: Meeps water Meepsie's flower, increasing all incoming Healing and Shielding by 12% (%i:set14AmpIcon%).

ability.name: Primordial Breath
ability.desc: Passive: Attacks splash in a cone behind the target.

ability.name: Quantum Clone
ability.desc: Create a clone behind the target with 33/40/40% reduced max Health and 30 increased Mana cost. The clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current Health, and can cast Quantum Clone.

ability.name: Collateral Damage
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks fire 5 projectiles in a cone that deal 20/30/45 (%i:TFTBaseAD%) physical damage each.

Active: Fire an explosive shell that deals 390/585/5555 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, and 165/245/4110 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage to adjacent enemies.

ability.name: Psionic Crush
ability.desc:
Hurl a chunk of magnetic debris at the nearest target without one, dealing 300/450/999 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and sticking it to them. If an enemy with debris dies, it passes to the nearest enemy without one.

Every 5 casts, instead rip off all debris dealing 120/180/999 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage, then crush all the debris onto the target, dealing 720/1100/9999 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage and briefly stunning them.

ability.name: Upheaval
ability.desc: Heal 246/302/407 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then briefly knock up adjacent enemies and deal 80/120/180 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Indestructible
ability.desc: Gain 300/375/500 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield. Each second for the next 64 seconds, gain 75/90/105 (%i:scaleAP%) more Shield and deal 45/70/100 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to adjacent enemies. When this ability ends, consume the remaining Shield and heal for 40% of its value.

ability.name: Reality Tear
ability.desc:
Passive: On cast, attacks gain 33/53/819 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) stacking bonus magic damage. Starting from the third cast, gain true damage instead.

Active: Gain 395/601/4088 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 3 seconds, then slice open a rift on the largest group of champions dealing the Passive's bonus damage to all enemies within. Enemies have their Attack Speed slowed by 50/50/99% while allies within gain 80/80/999% Attack Speed, both rapidly decaying over 3 seconds.

ability.name: Test of Spirit
ability.desc: Gain 450/525/650 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 3 seconds. Over the duration, drain 55/85/130 (%i:scaleAP%) Health from the nearest 3 enemies. Then slam down, dealing 80/120/180 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to all enemies within 2 hexes.

ability.name: Groovin' Susan
ability.desc: Transform for 6 seconds, temporarily gaining max Health, entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}, and dealing 44/70/115 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to adjacent enemies each second.

ability.name: Paddle Star
ability.desc: Fire a paddle star at the current target, dealing 68/102/153 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the first target hit and 34/51/77 (%i:scaleAP%) to others it passes through. When the missile reaches its destination, redirect it to a distant enemy, increasing its speed and repeating the damage. This redirect can occur 54 times.

ability.name: Slingshot Maneuver
ability.desc:
Passive: Every 5th attack, launch a returning boomerang at the target that travels two hexes past the first enemy it hits. It deals 245/370/605 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage, reduced by 75% per hit.

Meep Bonus: 1 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeps attack alongside Gnar, dealing 12/17/26 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAS%) physical damage per second.

ability.name: Singularity
ability.desc: Gather the force of a black hole, dealing 570/855/5000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between the target and the closest enemies to them. The target takes an additional 180/270/1000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Gravitational Spin
ability.desc:
Gain 675/825/2000 (%i:scaleAP%) shield for 4 seconds. Then, strike enemies in a three hex line, dealing 80/120/1360 (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleArmor%) magic damage.

Meep Bonus: Reduce the damage of incoming attacks by 4 (%i:set14AmpIcon%). After being attacked 20 times, deal 12/18/300 (%i:scaleArmor%%i:set14AmpIcon%) magic damage in a two hex radius.

ability.name: Cosmic Pursuit
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks and Abilities mark the target. When an enemy reaches 3 marks, Wolf consumes the marks, dealing 125/190/1000 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage. 

Active: Jump up to 1 hex away and fire arrows at the nearest targets, each dealing 0.75/1.15/6 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage.

ability.name: Dark Matter
ability.desc: Hurl a shard towards the current target, dealing 250/375/600 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the first target it hits. After hitting its initial target or at its final destination, the dagger explodes dealing 50/75/115 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to nearby targets.

ability.name: Divine Scythe
ability.desc: Gain 20% Durability for 2 seconds, healing 500/550/650 (%i:scaleAP%) over the duration. Afterwards, slash forward in a line, dealing 120/180/300 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to enemies hit and knocking them up for 1 second.

ability.name: Space Opera
ability.desc:
Passive: Jhin has a fixed attack speed of and converts every 1% of bonus Attack Speed into 0.75 bonus Attack Damage.

Active: Summon 4 spectral hands that fire alongside Jhin for the next 4 attacks. Each hand deals 45/68/688 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage per shot. The final shots deal 244% more damage and pierce through the most enemies in a line, dealing 44% reduced damage per target hit.

ability.name: Bullet Cluster
ability.desc:
Passive: On takedown, gain 10 mana.

Active: Fire 16 missiles in a 2-hex radius around the current target, dealing 33/50/79 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each.

ability.name: Grasp of Convergence
ability.desc:
Passive: Gain 50% more max Health from all sources.

Active: Converge an X-shape of vines on the target, dealing 100/150/225 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each enemy hit and Stunning them for seconds.

ability.name: Hopped-Up Hacks
ability.desc:
Open a 2 hex rift containing the target, Hacking enemies within for 4 seconds and dealing 80/120/190 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to each, plus 370/555/890 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies hit.

Hacked enemies store 10% of all damage they take. When the Hack ends, they take true damage equal to the stored damage. The Hack ends early if it would kill the target.

ability.name: Stellar Ricochet
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks bounce to strike 3/3/5 times, dealing 60/60/30% reduced damage per target hit and leaving a Feather behind the final target.

Active: Gain 75% Attack Speed for the next 6 attacks. At the end, recall all Feathers split between the closest 3 enemies, dealing 51/77/960 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each. Xayah's current target takes 10/15/200 (%i:scaleAD%) additional physical damage per feather.

ability.name: Chemical Rage
ability.desc: Heal 496/615/892 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) over 2 seconds. Then, deal 200/300/450 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to target and enemies adjacent to them and 30% Chill them for 2 seconds.

ability.name: Gravity Matrix
ability.desc: Enter a defensive stance for 4 seconds gaining 20/20/60% Durability. While in the defensive stance, attract nearby enemy projectiles and heal 900/1300/3000 (%i:scaleAP%) over the duration. When this ends, release a shockwave that deals 96/144/3600 (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) as physical damage in a 2-hex range.

ability.name: Dance n' Dice
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal magic damage. Gwen is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} while targeting an enemy below 40% Health.

Active: Dash to a nearby hex to snip the lowest percent Health enemy, dealing 145/220/380 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target and 75/110/190 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies in a cone. If this kills, dash and snip again at 65% damage!

ability.name: Star Strike
ability.desc: Reposition next to the target to strike the most enemies. Then throw 5 piercing kunai, each dealing 41/62/93 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the first enemy hit, reduced to 16/25/37 (%i:scaleAD%) for each subsequent target. Kunai remove 1 Armor, 2 if they crit.
ability.descCond: N.O.V.A. Strike: Slice all enemies, applying Wound and a bleed that deals 10/14/18 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each second. Kunai increase the damage of the bleed by 10%.

ability.name: Perfect Bladework
ability.desc:
Passive: Every 2 attacks, reveal a Vital on the target. If a Vital exists, dash to attack it dealing 40/60/777 (%i:scaleAD%) bonus true damage and heal for 15% of the damage dealt.

Active: Reveal 6 Vitals on the target and quickly attack them all. If the target dies, remaining Vitals transfer to the nearest enemy. Upon striking the final Vital, create a two hex aura that heals allies within for 200/250/999 (%i:scaleAP%) over 5 seconds.

ability.name: Party Crasher
ability.desc:
Passive: Every 2/2/0.5 seconds, call down a bolt on the highest Health nearby enemy that deals 60/90/150 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

Active: Summon a disco ball at the largest clump of enemies, then knock up the current target into it, dealing 150/225/999 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. They crash down into the disco ball, dealing 175/265/5000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage in a three hex radius. Enter {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for 1 second per enemy hit.

ability.name: Gun Goddess Arsenal
ability.desc: Field Miss Fortune to choose whether she activates Conduit Mode, Challenger Mode, or Replicator Mode. The chosen mode determines her ability and her trait.

ability.name: Stellar Slash
ability.desc: Heal 300/375/575 (%i:scaleAP%), then deal 161/242/362 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage to the current target.
ability.descCond: N.O.V.A. Strike: Cleave the battlefield, briefly knocking up all enemies and dealing 81/121/181 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleArmor%) physical damage.

ability.name: Unstoppable Dreadnought
ability.desc:
Passive - Proximity Blast: Whenever an enemy enters a 0 (%i:scaleRange%) hex radius, fire a blast in a cone towards the closest adjacent hex that deals 85/125/200 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage with 30% falloff per hex. Each adjacent hex has a 5 second cooldown, and starts combat on cooldown.

Active: Gain 150/175/200 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 3 seconds and reposition up to one hex to maximize the number of targets within Proximity Blast's radius. Reset Proximity Blast's cooldowns.

ability.name: It's Raining Stars
ability.desc:
Passive: Gain a different secondary effect each game based on the Stargazer constellation.

Active: Call down something from the sky, dealing 150/225/360 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to 3 nearby enemies and do some special effect based on this game's Stargazer Constellation.

ability.name: Jump and Jive
ability.desc:
Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up, shoot them, dealing 65/95/155 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage and entering {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for 3 seconds.

Active: Unleash a volley of bullets at the target, dealing 375/560/900 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage and knocking up for 1.25 seconds.

ability.name: Advanced Defences
ability.desc: Gain 329/397/675 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%) Shield and 15% Durability for 4 seconds. Over the duration, deal 30/45/70 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage each second to enemies in a cone.

ability.name: Diviner's Judgment
ability.desc: Stab the target, causing them to bleed for 490/735/1135 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage over 18 seconds. After the attack, leap to the highest percent Health enemy within 3 hexes.

ability.name: Ultra Friendly Object
ability.desc:
Summon a flying saucer over the current target that lasts 54 seconds. Each second it deals 220/330/3000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the target, plus 135/205/1500 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage split between all enemies within 1 hex. The saucer deals 30% increased damage to Tanks.

If an enemy under the UFO dies, Bard has a 15/20/100% chance to abduct them and create a 1-star copy on your bench.

Meep bonus: On combat start, grant the nearest 0 (%i:set14AmpIcon%) Meeple allies an additional Meep.

ability.name: Calamity
ability.desc: Gain 475/575/2000 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 4 seconds. Summon an astrolabe to crash down on a nearby hex, dealing 120/180/2000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes. Then, push the astrolabe towards the end of the board, dealing 100/150/2000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. All enemies hit by the astrolabe are knocked up for 1.5/1.75/8 seconds.

ability.name: Fate's Gambit
ability.desc:
Draw a card with a value between 1 and 9 by Lucky chance, then throw it at the target. Based on the card drawn, deal between 180/270/405 (%i:scaleAP%) and 360/540/810 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. Overkill damage bounces to the nearest enemy. 

3-Star Bonus: If a 9 is thrown, generate 1 gold.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.

ability.name: Double Time
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal 30/45/100 (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage and an additional 65/95/170 (%i:scaleAP%) stacking magic damage over 6 seconds. While an enemy has 5 or more stacks, Teemo is in {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}}.

Active: Gain 150% Attack Speed for 3 attacks.

ability.name: Fish Frenzy
ability.desc:
Passive: For every 1% missing Health, gain 2/2/2.5% (%i:scaleAP%) Attack Speed

Active: Deal 120/180/285 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the target, increased by 50% if they're a tank.

ability.name: Psionic Storm
ability.desc: Channel a one-hex psionic storm that follows enemies for 54 seconds. Each second, it grows larger and deals 185/275/475 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies within, reduced by 60% per hex from the epicenter.

ability.name: Time Warp
ability.desc:
Passive: This Ability adapts to Attack Damage or Ability Power, whichever is higher. Attacks deal 75/115/300 (%i:scaleAP% or %i:scaleAD%) damage.

Active: Dash to a nearby hex, gaining 100/150/1200 Shield for 2 seconds and slashing adjacent enemies for 90/135/1000 (%i:scaleAP% or %i:scaleAD%) damage. Every third cast, leap into the air and launch a wave of energy that deals 160/240/2000 (%i:scaleAP% or %i:scaleAD%) damage to enemies in a line.

ability.name: Dark Form
ability.desc: Transform for 3 seconds, gaining 655/859/4606 (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) Health and tethering to nearby champions. Over the duration, deal 100/150/3000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to the closest 3 enemies and restore 100/150/3000 (%i:scaleAP%) health to the closest 2 injured allies.

ability.name: Tongue Lash
ability.desc:
Passive: Once per combat after dropping below 35% Health, gain Shield for 4 seconds equal to 40% of healing received this combat.

Active: Heal 411/559/1858 (%i:scaleHealth%%i:scaleAP%), then tongue lash all enemies within two hexes dealing 71/107/1584 (%i:scaleAP%%i:scaleHealth%) magic damage.

ability.name: Shield of Daybreak
ability.desc: Gain 420/480/620 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield for 4 seconds. Bash the current target, dealing 196/294/441 (%i:scaleArmor%%i:scaleMR%) magic damage and stunning them for seconds.

ability.name: Fracture Reality
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal 62/93/250 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage instead.

Active: Summon 5 clones that attack alongside for 5 attacks, dealing damage. For their final attack, clones fire a bolt that deals 80/120/750 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: Aim For The Head
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks have a 15% Lucky chance to fire an empowered Headshot, dealing 190/285/555 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

Lucky: Check twice and take the better outcome.
ability.descCond: N.O.V.A. Strike: Mark all enemies, increasing damage taken by 10%. The first time marked targets drop below 50% Health, Headshot them for 76/114/222 (%i:scaleAD%%i:scaleAP%) physical damage.

ability.name: Bubble Pop
ability.desc: Toss a disco bubble at the target that deals 440/660/5000 (%i:scaleAP%) split between enemies in a one hex radius. The explosion sends 3 globs towards nearby enemies that deal 110/165/1000 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage. On cast, Nami enters {{TFT17_SpaceGroove_TheGroove}} for 3 seconds.

ability.name: Explosive Attitude
ability.desc: Fire a barrage of 16 (%i:scaleAS%) rockets in a cone, each dealing 32/49/77 (%i:scaleAD%) physical damage to the first target hit.

ability.name: Pale Cascade
ability.desc:
Passive: Attacks deal 52/78/135 (%i:scaleAP%) bonus magic damage.

Active: Gain 275/325/475 (%i:scaleAP%) Shield and summon 3 encircling orbs for 3 seconds. Orbs deal 60/90/145 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage to enemies they pass through, and rotate faster based on Attack Speed.

ability.name: Golem Smash
ability.desc: Slam the target dealing 300/480/750 (%i:scaleAP%) magic damage.

ability.name: On Duty!
ability.desc: The Training Dummy cannot move or attack. It is also dressed like a devilishly handsome Yordle.
